title: lithocarpus pierrei
intro: Lithocarpus pierrei, also known as the Chinese tan oak or Quercus pierrei, is a species of plant in the beech family Fagaceae. Native to southern China and northern Vietnam, this plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lithocarpus pierrei include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and protecting against oxidative stress. Lithocarpus pierrei can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
